languages.original_text: {n}After a period of silence, the Manipulus relays:{/n} "My dearest colleague has accused me of oversimplifying matters. He believes that in trying to convey my point of view, I neglected many of the nuances you set forth in the question, and thus gave a trite answer myself. But he considers the general premise to be correct, albeit riddled with holes."

languages.text: {n}Помолчав, манипулус передает:{/n} "Дражайший коллега обвиняет меня в излишнем упрощении. Он считает, что, пытаясь донести свою точку зрения, я пренебрег многими нюансами, заложенными вами в вопрос, и тем самым сам выдал банальный ответ. Но общий посыл он считает верным, пусть и полным изъянов".

{n}After a period of silence, the Manipulus relays:{/n} "My dearest colleague has accused me of oversimplifying matters. He believes that in trying to convey my point of view, I neglected many of the nuances you set forth in the question, and thus gave a trite answer myself. But he considers the general premise to be correct, albeit riddled with holes."

Он считает, что, пытаясь донести свою точку зрения, я пренебрег многими нюансами, заложенными вами в вопрос, и тем самым сам выдал банальный ответ. Но общий посыл он считает верным, пусть и полным изъянов".

He believes that in trying to convey my point of view, I neglected many of the nuances you set forth in the question, and thus gave a trite answer myself. But he considers the general premise to be correct, albeit riddled with holes."

He believes that in trying to convey my point of view, I neglected many of the nuances you set forth in the question, and thus gave a trite answer myself. But he considers the general premise to be correct, albeit riddled with holes."

{n}After a period of silence, the Manipulus relays:{/n} "My dearest colleague has accused me of oversimplifying matters. He believes that in trying to convey my point of view, I neglected many of the nuances you set forth in the question, and thus gave a trite answer myself. But he considers the general premise to be correct, albeit riddled with holes."

languages.text: {n}Tras unos momentos de silencio, el manipulus transmite el mensaje:{/n} «Mi querido colega me ha acusado de simplificar las cosas en exceso. Cree que, al intentar explicar mi punto de vista, he ignorado muchas de las sutilezas implícitas en la pregunta, y, por tanto, he ofrecido una respuesta trillada. Pero considera que la premisa general es correcta, a pesar de las lagunas».
languages.original_text: {n}After a period of silence, the Manipulus relays:{/n} "My dearest colleague has accused me of oversimplifying matters. He believes that in trying to convey my point of view, I neglected many of the nuances you set forth in the question, and thus gave a trite answer myself. But he considers the general premise to be correct, albeit riddled with holes."

traits.locale_text: {n}Tras unos momentos de silencio, el manipulus transmite el mensaje:{/n} «Mi querido colega me ha acusado de simplificar las cosas en exceso. Cree que, al intentar explicar mi punto de vista, he ignorado muchas de las sutilezas implícitas en la pregunta, y, por tanto, he ofrecido una respuesta trillada. Pero considera que la premisa general es correcta, a pesar de las lagunas».

languages.text: {n}沉默片刻后，这位操纵者转述道：{/n}“我最亲爱的同僚指责我把问题过度简化了。他认为，我在试图表达自己的观点时，忽略了您问题中的许多细微之处，因此给出了过于俗套的回答。但他认为总体方向是正确的，尽管漏洞百出。”
languages.original_text: {n}After a period of silence, the Manipulus relays:{/n} "My dearest colleague has accused me of oversimplifying matters. He believes that in trying to convey my point of view, I neglected many of the nuances you set forth in the question, and thus gave a trite answer myself. But he considers the general premise to be correct, albeit riddled with holes."

traits.locale_text: {n}沉默片刻后，这位操纵者转述道：{/n}“我最亲爱的同僚指责我把问题过度简化了。他认为，我在试图表达自己的观点时，忽略了您问题中的许多细微之处，因此给出了过于俗套的回答。但他认为总体方向是正确的，尽管漏洞百出。”

languages.text: {n}Après un long silence, le Manipulus transmet :{/n} « Mon cher collègue m'accuse de trop simplifier les choses. Il estime qu'en cherchant à faire comprendre mon point de vue, j'ai négligé les nombreuses nuances de votre question, et que c'est donc ma réponse qui manquait d'originalité. Il considère cependant l'idée générale comme étant correcte, quoique bien trop incomplète. »
languages.original_text: {n}After a period of silence, the Manipulus relays:{/n} "My dearest colleague has accused me of oversimplifying matters. He believes that in trying to convey my point of view, I neglected many of the nuances you set forth in the question, and thus gave a trite answer myself. But he considers the general premise to be correct, albeit riddled with holes."

traits.locale_text: {n}Après un long silence, le Manipulus transmet :{/n} « Mon cher collègue m'accuse de trop simplifier les choses. Il estime qu'en cherchant à faire comprendre mon point de vue, j'ai négligé les nombreuses nuances de votre question, et que c'est donc ma réponse qui manquait d'originalité. Il considère cependant l'idée générale comme étant correcte, quoique bien trop incomplète. »

languages.text: {n}Nach einer längeren Pause erklärt der Manipulus:{/n} "Mein geschätzter Kollege wirft mir vor, die Dinge zu stark zu vereinfachen. Er glaubt, ich habe bei der Darlegung meines Standpunktes viele Nuancen der Frage ignoriert und somit selbst eine triviale Antwort gegeben. Allerdings hält er die Prämisse im Allgemeinen für korrekt, aber löchrig."
languages.original_text: {n}After a period of silence, the Manipulus relays:{/n} "My dearest colleague has accused me of oversimplifying matters. He believes that in trying to convey my point of view, I neglected many of the nuances you set forth in the question, and thus gave a trite answer myself. But he considers the general premise to be correct, albeit riddled with holes."

traits.locale_text: {n}Nach einer längeren Pause erklärt der Manipulus:{/n} "Mein geschätzter Kollege wirft mir vor, die Dinge zu stark zu vereinfachen. Er glaubt, ich habe bei der Darlegung meines Standpunktes viele Nuancen der Frage ignoriert und somit selbst eine triviale Antwort gegeben. Allerdings hält er die Prämisse im Allgemeinen für korrekt, aber löchrig."

languages.text: {n}しばらくの沈黙の後、マニピュラスが言った：{/n}「私の親愛なる同僚は、私が問題を単純化しすぎていると非難しています。彼は、私の見解を伝えようとするあまり、あなたが質問で示したニュアンスの多くを無視し、その結果、私自身が陳腐な回答をしたと考えている。しかし、穴だらけではあるが、大前提は正しいと彼は考えている。」
languages.original_text: {n}After a period of silence, the Manipulus relays:{/n} "My dearest colleague has accused me of oversimplifying matters. He believes that in trying to convey my point of view, I neglected many of the nuances you set forth in the question, and thus gave a trite answer myself. But he considers the general premise to be correct, albeit riddled with holes."

traits.locale_text: {n}しばらくの沈黙の後、マニピュラスが言った：{/n}「私の親愛なる同僚は、私が問題を単純化しすぎていると非難しています。彼は、私の見解を伝えようとするあまり、あなたが質問で示したニュアンスの多くを無視し、その結果、私自身が陳腐な回答をしたと考えている。しかし、穴だらけではあるが、大前提は正しいと彼は考えている。」

languages.text: {n}Bir süre sessiz kaldıktan sonra Manipülus, Nuncius'un düşüncelerini iletiyor.{/n} "Pek değerli meslektaşım beni meseleleri aşırı basitleştirmekle suçluyor. Kendi bakış açımı aktarmaya çalışırken soruda ortaya koyduğunuz nüansların çoğunu ihmal ettiğime ve bu nedenle benim de beylik bir cevap verdiğime inanıyor. Ancak genel önermeyi, delik deşik de olsa doğru buluyor."
languages.original_text: {n}After a period of silence, the Manipulus relays:{/n} "My dearest colleague has accused me of oversimplifying matters. He believes that in trying to convey my point of view, I neglected many of the nuances you set forth in the question, and thus gave a trite answer myself. But he considers the general premise to be correct, albeit riddled with holes."

traits.locale_text: {n}Bir süre sessiz kaldıktan sonra Manipülus, Nuncius'un düşüncelerini iletiyor.{/n} "Pek değerli meslektaşım beni meseleleri aşırı basitleştirmekle suçluyor. Kendi bakış açımı aktarmaya çalışırken soruda ortaya koyduğunuz nüansların çoğunu ihmal ettiğime ve bu nedenle benim de beylik bir cevap verdiğime inanıyor. Ancak genel önermeyi, delik deşik de olsa doğru buluyor."
